Settings

Required for uploading images to the gallery via GitHub. Token needs repo scope.

When set to Private, search engines will not index your Mast-hosted site. Set to Public when you're ready to be found in search results.

Number of upcoming events displayed in the homepage schedule section.

Enable dark theme for the admin panel.

Allow visitors on the public site to submit feedback via a floating button.

Show the Testing Mode panel in the sidebar. Useful for QA testing with guided missions.

Choose your payment processor. Only one can be active at a time. Your credentials are preserved if you switch.

Square

Configure Square payment integration. Save credentials for both environments, then toggle the active one.

SANDBOX MODE — Test payments only, no real charges
Sandbox Credentials
Production Credentials

Configure Stripe payment integration. The environment is auto-detected from your key prefix (sk_test_ or sk_live_).

TEST MODE — Using test keys, no real charges

Choose how shipping labels are generated. API-based providers let you buy labels and get tracking directly in Mast.

Get your API key from goshippo.com/settings/api. Use a test key (shippo_test_...) for testing, live key for production.

Only studios with a physical address are shown. Manage studio locations

Common box sizes for quick selection when shipping orders. Presets save automatically.

Configure how shipping is calculated for retail and wholesale orders. Each uses its own strategy with optional modifiers.

$
$

Tax rates by US state. Rates are applied at checkout based on the customer's shipping state. Set your nexus state (where you collect tax) and configure rates for applicable states.

State Rate (%)

Configure how order receipts, commission notifications, and other emails are sent.

Mast-Managed Email

1 token per email, sent from

Token balance: —

Gmail Setup

Requires a Gmail App Password. In your Google Account:

  1. Enable 2-Step Verification
  2. Go to Security > App Passwords
  3. Create an app password for "Mail"

Set these secrets in GCP Secret Manager with your tenant prefix:

{prefix}-gmail-user
{prefix}-gmail-app-password

Configure which business alerts you receive and how they're delivered. Alerts are evaluated automatically every 4 hours.

Used for address autocomplete at checkout. Restrict by HTTP referrer in Google Cloud Console.

Connect your Etsy shop to sync orders automatically. Etsy orders appear in the Orders tab with an "Etsy" badge.

From your Etsy Developer app dashboard

API key for the LabelKeeper print card integration. Get it from the LabelKeeper project's GCP Secret Manager.

Workshop operators who work on production builds. These names appear in the operator selector when starting builds.

Mark your studio and workshop locations. When using the PoS away from all studio locations, Studio Companion will detect you're at a remote event and offer to link sales.

Tap "Add Current Location" while at the studio — your GPS coordinates will be saved automatically. Detection radius: 500m.

Track where inventory is stored. Each location gets a QR code for quick scanning during intake, packing, and moves. The "Home" location is created automatically and can't be archived.

Photos captured during production builds are stored in Firebase Storage.

Loading...

Standard mileage rates for tax deduction. Rate is locked to the year when a trip is created.

Saved locations used in trip origin/destination pickers. Locations are auto-added when new destinations are entered during trips.

Configure how inventory status, lead times, and badges appear on your public storefront.

Display estimated fulfillment time on product pages and cart based on inventory mode.

Show a call-to-action on discontinued + sold products inviting custom commissions.

Customize the text shown on product badges. Use {n} for stock count where applicable.

Toggle cards on or off, and drag to reorder. Changes apply to your account only.

Number of quick action tiles to show on the dashboard. Your most-used actions appear first.

Manage the domains that point to your storefront. Your primary domain and Firebase default domain are set automatically.

Loading domains...

Point your own domain to this storefront. You'll get step-by-step DNS setup instructions with links to your registrar's settings page.

DNS Setup Required

Connect AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor) to manage your store through natural language. Generate an API key and add it to your AI tool's configuration.

Loading API keys...
Your API Key

Copy this key now — it won't be shown again.

Setup Instructions

Create a new MCP connector called "Mast Tenant MCP" in your AI tool and add the server URL below.

Server URL:
Claude.ai
  1. Go to Settings > Connectors > Add MCP
  2. Name it "Mast Tenant MCP"
  3. Paste the server URL above
  4. Claude.ai supports OAuth — just sign in with your Google account when prompted. No API key needed.
Claude Code

Add to your .mcp.json or Claude Code settings. Uses API key auth:


                
              

            

          

          

            Cursor / VS Code
            

              
Add to your settings.json under MCP servers. Uses API key auth:

              

                

                
              

            

          

          

            Other AI Tools
            

              

                If your AI tool supports MCP connectors, add the server URL above. If it supports OAuth, just sign in — no API key needed. Otherwise, generate an API key above and add it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
              

            

          

        

        
        

          

          
Startup Prompt

          

            After connecting your AI tool, paste this prompt into your project instructions (Claude.ai) or custom instructions (other tools). This teaches your AI assistant how to work with your store.
          

          

            

            
          

          

            Once pasted, just say "Startup Mast" in any conversation to get started.
